name: io.github.topness-msft/callwright
description: Self-hosted MCP voice agent that places phone calls on your behalf via Retell.

environmentVariables.name: RETELL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Retell secret API key (stays server-side)

environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token clients must send; required when exposed beyond localhost

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port the HTTP MCP server listens on (default 8787)

environmentVariables.name: CALLWRIGHT_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Persistent directory for runtime state such as trigger deduplication

environmentVariables.name: CALLWRIGHT_PUBLIC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public Callwright base URL used to configure Retell webhook delivery

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_ROUTINE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional complete Claude cloud Routine /fire endpoint URL

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_ROUTINE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional dedicated bearer token for the configured Claude Routine trigger
